/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdrive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libdrive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/drive_base_msgs/msg/detail/command_header__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/drive_base_msgs/msg/detail/base_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/drive_base_msgs/msg/detail/command_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drive_base_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/drive_base_msgs/msg/detail/trv_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
